title: Constitutional Organs Not Constituted on Time

bottlenecks.summary: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.

satisfied_duties.duty: provide by law for the first federal elections and orderly commencement of terms under the new constitutional order
satisfied_duties.outcome: provided by law for the first federal elections and orderly commencement of terms under the new constitutional order

failed_duties.duty: constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution
failed_duties.outcome: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress and appointing authorities failed to constitute the Constitutional Organs on the timeline required by the Constitution by day 365 under Article XIX Section 5.2.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
